title: S + will be + p.p.（未來被動）

formulas.zh: 主詞＋未來式＋被動語態，表示未來將被執行的動作

formulas.formula: S + is/are going to be + p.p.
formulas.zh: 主詞＋近未來式＋被動語態，表示即將被執行的動作
情態動詞＋被動語態，表示能夠、應該、必須被執行的動作

explanation: 未來式被動語態用於描述將來會被執行的動作。構造方式為：助動詞(will/is/are going to/can/should/must) + be + 過去分詞。使用時機包括：陳述未來的計畫、預測或義務。需注意主詞為動作的承受者而非執行者。常見錯誤是混淆主被動或時態選擇，應根據語境判斷是確定未來(will be)或即將發生(is going to be)。情態動詞被動需保持情態詞之後接be。

examples.eng: The new stadium will be built next year in this city.
examples.chi: 新運動場將在明年於本城市興建。

examples.eng: The project is going to be completed by the team next month.
examples.chi: 該專案將於下月由團隊完成。

examples.eng: The documents must be submitted before the deadline.
examples.chi: 文件必須在截止期限前提交。

examples.eng: The conference should be held in a larger venue for more attendees.
examples.chi: 為了容納更多參與者，會議應該在更大的場地舉行。

extension.tip: 判斷被動語態的關鍵：主詞是否為動作的承受者。「未來式被動」強調時間在未來，「情態動詞被動」強調可能性或義務。注意：is being done 為現在進行被動(動作進行中)，不同於 will be done(未來純被動)。避免主被動混淆，檢查主詞與動詞關係。

examples.test: The house will paint next week. ✗
examples.result: → The house will be painted next week. ✓(主詞house是被動作的，需加be)

examples.test: They are going to build a bridge. (主動)
examples.result: → A bridge is going to be built by them. (被動，主詞轉為承受者)

examples.test: The report must hand in tomorrow. ✗
examples.result: → The report must be handed in tomorrow. ✓(情態動詞後接be+p.p.)

extension.note: 未來被動：助動詞+be+過去分詞；情態動詞被動：情態詞+be+過去分詞；主詞判斷為先，動作承受者用被動。

exercises.sentence: The exam will be held on Friday next week.
exercises.translation: 考試將在下週星期五舉行。

parts: by the board of directors very soon.
exercises.sentence: This important decision is going to be made by the board of directors very soon.
exercises.translation: 這個重要決定將很快由董事會做出。

parts: to attend the orientation program tomorrow.
exercises.sentence: All students must be required to attend the orientation program tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 所有學生必須參加明天的新生說明會。

parts: and replaced with new ones by next month.
exercises.sentence: The damaged equipment will be repaired and replaced with new ones by next month.
exercises.translation: 損壞的設備將在下月前被修理並更換為新的。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的未來被動式填空，描述明年的計畫
mc_exercises.question_eng: The new library _______ next year in our city.
mc_exercises.explanation: 主詞 The new library 是動作的承受者（被建造），故使用未來被動 will be + p.p.。B 項為主動態，違反句意；C、D 項為現在式，時間不符。正確答案：will be built。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據情態動詞判斷，完成表示可能性的被動句
mc_exercises.question_eng: This important document _______ to everyone before the meeting starts.
mc_exercises.explanation: 主詞 document 為動作承受者，需用被動語態。情態動詞 should 後接 be + p.p.，形成「should be distributed」。A 項缺少 be；C 項 distribute 應為過去分詞 distributed；D 項為主動態，不符句意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 區分 will be 與 is going to be，選擇最適當的未來被動式
mc_exercises.question_eng: Look at those dark clouds! It _______ to rain heavily, so the outdoor event _______ to be postponed.

options.text: will; is going to be decided
is going; is going to be decided

mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空：根據 dark clouds 這立即的徵兆，用 is going to rain（即將發生）更恰當。第二空：作為邏輯結果的決定，同樣用 is going to be decided 表示將要發生。A、B 項時態搭配不一致；D 項忽視視覺證據的即時性，採 will 不夠貼切。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複合句中多重被動形式，判斷時態與語態的正確搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: The CEO announced that the merger _______ completed by next quarter, and all employees _______ be informed through official channels once the process _______ finalized.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空：主詞 merger 為承受者，時間為 next quarter，用 will be completed（未來被動）。第二空：義務性通知用情態動詞被動 should be informed（應當被告知）。第三空：時間副詞 once 引導時間條件，用現在式 will be finalized 表示未來確定事項。A 項第三空誤用現在式；C 項主時態錯誤；D 項情態搭配與時態不符。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 明天的數學考試將在下午舉行。
translation_exercises.answer: The math exam will be held tomorrow afternoon.
hints: 提示1：使用 will be + 過去分詞(held)來表達未來被動
提示2：不要寫成主動 will hold，因為主詞 exam 是被考的，不是主動考的

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這份報告應該在星期五之前完成。
translation_exercises.answer: This report should be completed before Friday.
key_points: before Friday 時間介系詞片語
hints: 提示1：情態動詞(should) + be + 過去分詞(completed)構成被動
提示2：常見錯誤是寫成 should complete，忽略了主詞 report 是被完成的對象

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果我們現在不採取行動，這個環境問題將無法被解決。
translation_exercises.answer: If we don't take action now, this environmental problem will not be solved.
hints: 提示1：在條件句中，主句用未來式被動 will be + 過去分詞(solved)來表達未來的後果
提示2：注意主詞 problem 是動作的承受者；不要寫成 will not solve，那樣就變成主動了

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 下個月舉辦的這場音樂會據說將由多位知名藝人表演，且預計有五千人參加。
translation_exercises.answer: The concert to be held next month is said to be performed by several famous artists, and is expected to be attended by five thousand people.
key_points: to be held / will be performed / be attended
is said to be / is expected to be
hints: 提示1：本句包含多個未來被動結構：to be held(修飾concert的分詞結構)、be performed(情態動詞be後接過去分詞)、be attended(is expected後的被動不定詞)，需一一檢查
提示2：常見錯誤是混淆 to be held 與 will be held 的用法：to be held用於修飾名詞或作為被動不定詞，while will be held用於主要子句的未來被動；另外 performed 和 attended 的主詞分別是藝人和人數，務必確認主被動對應
